title: Staff Login screen shows heading and employee grid when staff exist
description: Verifies that the staff selection screen is visible and includes the expected heading and a grid of employee cards (when setup wizard is not blocking).

steps.description: Verify text "Who is working?" is visible
Verify element "Employee cards grid" is visible
Verify element "An employee card" is visible

title: Log in by selecting an employee card and reach POS table grid dashboard
description: Verifies that selecting a staff card transitions into the POS table grid dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Who is working?" is visible
Verify element "POS table grid dashboard" is visible
Verify text "Who is working?" is not visible

title: No staff available: show prompt and block entry to POS
description: Verifies that when no employee cards are available, the UI shows a prompt to add staff/contact admin and does not allow proceeding to the POS dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Who is working?" is visible
Verify element "Employee cards grid" is visible
Verify element "An employee card" is not visible
Verify element "POS table grid dashboard" is not visible

title: Staff Login screen remains stable on reload (no unexpected navigation)
description: Verifies that reloading the root page keeps the user on the staff selection screen when not logged in (and not blocked by wizard).

steps.description: Verify text "Who is working?" is visible
Verify text "Who is working?" is visible

title: Employee grid supports selection after scrolling (large staff list)
description: Verifies that an employee card can still be selected after scrolling when the staff list is long and the grid extends beyond the initial view.

steps.description: Verify text "Who is working?" is visible
Verify element "POS table grid dashboard" is visible

title: Prevent proceeding to POS when staff cards are absent (no clickable login options)
description: Verifies that in the no-staff state there is no visible interactive employee option that could be used to enter the POS.

steps.description: Verify text "Who is working?" is visible
Verify element "An employee card" is not visible
Verify element "POS table grid dashboard" is not visible

title: Process a cash payment successfully and return table to Available
description: Verifies a staff member can add an item to a table order, pay with sufficient cash, and see payment success with the table becoming Available.

steps.description: Click on the first visible table card whose test id starts with "table-1"
Click the "Add" button on a visible menu item card
Verify text "Add to Order" is visible
Click on "Add to Order" in the confirmation dialog
Fill "9999" into the cash received input field (cash-received)

title: Cash payment shows validation when cash received is insufficient
description: Verifies the payment dialog blocks confirmation and shows an insufficient cash validation message when cash received is less than the cart total.

steps.description: Click on the first visible table card whose test id starts with "table-1"
Click the "Add" button on a visible menu item card
Verify text "Add to Order" is visible
Click on "Add to Order" in the confirmation dialog
Fill "0" into the cash received input field (cash-received)

title: Cart total updates only after confirming Add to Order
description: Verifies that clicking a menu item’s Add button and confirming in the dialog increases the visible cart total.

steps.description: Click on the first visible table card whose test id starts with "table-1"
Click the "Add" button on a visible menu item card
Verify text "Add to Order" is visible
Click on "Add to Order" in the confirmation dialog

title: Canceling the Add to Order dialog does not change the cart
description: Verifies dismissing the Add to Order confirmation dialog does not add the item and does not change the visible cart total.

steps.description: Click on the first visible table card whose test id starts with "table-1"
Click the "Add" button on a visible menu item card
Verify text "Add to Order" is visible
Verify text "Add to Order" is not visible

title: Payment dialog can be opened and closed without confirming payment
description: Verifies the payment dialog opens from the cart and can be closed without completing a transaction.

steps.description: Click on the first visible table card whose test id starts with "table-1"
Click the "Add" button on a visible menu item card
Click on "Add to Order" in the confirmation dialog

title: Create a new menu item with name, positive price, and description
description: Verifies authorized staff can add a valid menu item via Manage Menu and see it appear in the POS menu list.

steps.description: Click the "Manage Menu" button or icon
Type "E2E Latte" into the item name input
Type "4.50" into the item price input
Type "Test description" into the item description input

title: Create a new menu item with name and positive price only (no description)
description: Verifies description is optional when saving a new menu item.

steps.description: Click the "Manage Menu" button or icon
Type "E2E Espresso" into the item name input
Type "2.75" into the item price input

title: Validation: price missing shows an error and item is not added
description: Verifies the Manage Menu form blocks saving when price is empty and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click the "Manage Menu" button or icon
Type "E2E No Price" into the item name input
Verify text "E2E No Price" is not visible

title: Validation: negative price shows an error and item is not added
description: Verifies the Manage Menu form blocks saving when price is negative and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click the "Manage Menu" button or icon
Type "E2E Negative Price" into the item name input
Type "-1" into the item price input
Verify text "E2E Negative Price" is not visible

title: Validation: non-numeric price shows an error
description: Verifies the Manage Menu form rejects a non-numeric price value with a visible error.

steps.description: Click the "Manage Menu" button or icon
Type "E2E Bad Price" into the item name input
Type "abc" into the item price input

title: Validation: missing item name shows an error and does not save
description: Verifies the Manage Menu form blocks saving when the item name is empty and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click the "Manage Menu" button or icon
Type "3.25" into the item price input

title: Place an order successfully from the self-service page
description: Verifies a customer can add an item to the cart and submit an order, then see a confirmation message.

steps.description: Scroll to a visible menu item card
Click on "Add" on a visible menu item

title: Prevent submitting an empty order
description: Verifies submitting an order with an empty cart is blocked with a visible validation error.

steps.description: Verify text "Please add items" is visible
Verify text "Order confirmation" is not visible

title: Cart updates only when using the Add button on a menu item
description: Verifies the cart does not change when only browsing, and updates after explicitly clicking the Add button on a menu card.

steps.description: Scroll to a visible menu item card
Verify text "Your cart is empty" is visible
Click on "Add" on the same visible menu item
Verify text "Your cart is empty" is not visible

title: Add multiple different items and verify cart reflects multiple lines before submitting
description: Verifies a customer can add more than one menu item and sees multiple items reflected in the cart area before submission.

steps.description: Click on "Add" on a first visible menu item
Scroll to a different visible menu item card
Click on "Add" on the different visible menu item
Verify element "Cart item list" is visible

title: Submit order after adding multiple items shows confirmation and clears cart state
description: Verifies submitting an order after adding items results in a confirmation message and the cart returns to an empty state.

steps.description: Click on "Add" on a visible menu item
Click on "Add" on another visible menu item
Verify text "Your cart is empty" is visible

title: Admin can access Bill History and view completed bills list
description: Verifies an admin user can reach the Bill History tab from the main POS layout and see completed bills content.

steps.description: Click on the admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Bill History" tab in the main layout
Verify an element "bill history list" is visible

title: Admin can add an expense and see it in the Expenses list
description: Verifies an admin user can add a new expense from the Expenses tab and the newly saved expense appears in the list.

steps.description: Click on the admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Expenses" tab in the main layout

title: Admin sees validation when saving an expense with missing required fields
description: Verifies the Add Expense form prevents saving when required fields are missing and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on the admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Expenses" tab in the main layout

title: Admin can open Table Management and add a new table
description: Verifies an admin user can add a new table from Table Management and the new table card appears on the POS grid.

steps.description: Click on the admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Table Management" tab in the main layout
Type "Table A" into the "Table name" field

title: Admin cannot add a table with a blank name
description: Verifies the Add Table flow enforces a non-empty table name and shows a visible error or prevents saving.

steps.description: Click on the admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Table Management" tab in the main layout

title: Admin can cancel out of Add Expense without creating a new entry
description: Verifies an admin user can dismiss the Add Expense UI and no new expense appears in the list.

steps.description: Click on the admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Expenses" tab in the main layout
Verify text "Add Expense" is not visible

title: Non-admin user is blocked from accessing Sales Report / Analytics
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot open the Sales Report / Analytics tab and sees a disabled state or a permission denied message.

steps.description: Click on a non-admin user in the staff selection grid
Click on "Sales Report" or "Analytics" tab in the main layout

title: Non-admin user sees Sales Report / Analytics tab disabled (no access)
description: Verifies the Sales Report / Analytics entry is visibly disabled or not actionable for a non-admin user.

steps.description: Click on a non-admin user in the staff selection grid
Verify element "Sales Report tab (disabled)" is visible
Click on "Expenses" tab in the main layout
